mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( NOTI_ID, MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTI_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{notiType}, #{message}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID, MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CREATED_AT FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY IS_READ ASC, CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE NOTI_ID = #{notiId}
UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
